entries.title: Portfolio site navigation
entries.content:
## Portfolio navigation (chat links allowlist)

Homepage section hashes (for the sources footer only):

- #contact → Contact
- #credentials → Credentials (education and certifications)
- #experience → Experience
- #about → About
- #expertise → Expertise
- #technologies → Technologies
- #home, #highlights as needed

Resume page (inline in the answer when relevant): [Resume](/resume/)

Do **not** link to `/credentials`, `/credentials/[slug]`, `/pages`, or any other on-site path.
Do **not** put homepage section hashes in the answer prose; use the sources footer only.
Do **not** write bare `/resume/` paths or closing CTAs such as “review his history” or “reach out via the Contact section”.
External URLs from context (LinkedIn, GitHub, mailto, issuer sites) are fine when quoting contact or proof links.

entries.title: Full resume
entries.content:
## Resume on this site

A full resume is available at /resume/. Visitors can use **Print / Save as PDF** on that page (Print-friendly resume. Use your browser print dialog to save as PDF.).

# Gokul Dinesh

Application Architect
Bengaluru, India • Open to UAE Opportunities

Email: gokul.dinesh14@gmail.com
Website: https://gokuldinesh.github.io
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/gokuldinesh
GitHub: https://github.com/gokuldinesh

## SUMMARY

Application Architect focused on scalable enterprise systems, reusable engineering platforms, and maintainable software delivery practices. Experienced in system design, engineering standardization, and technical leadership across large-scale enterprise application ecosystems.

## EXPERIENCE

### Swiss Re

Application Engineer III
Jan 2023 - Present • Bengaluru

- Defined application architecture and modernization roadmaps for business-critical enterprise systems, aligning technical execution with product priorities and long-term delivery outcomes.
- Established reusable platform foundations, shared engineering patterns, and reference implementations to improve consistency, reduce duplication, and strengthen maintainability across enterprise applications.
- Led cross-team architecture reviews and technical discussions to improve architectural consistency, accelerate decision-making, and strengthen delivery predictability.
- Integrated AI-assisted workflows into engineering practices to accelerate implementation, improve code quality, and shorten development feedback cycles.
- Worked across frontend, backend, and platform concerns to align scalable application architecture with evolving engineering and business needs.

### EMCAD Technologies

Senior Software Engineer
Oct 2021 - Dec 2022 • Bengaluru

- Led frontend technical direction across related enterprise applications, translating product requirements into scalable architecture and executable delivery plans.
- Built reusable component libraries, shared utilities, and engineering foundations that improved implementation consistency and accelerated development workflows across related applications.
- Designed and implemented modular micro-frontend foundations that enabled independent team delivery and scalable platform evolution.
- Mentored engineers through design reviews, code reviews, and technical guidance to strengthen engineering quality, maintainability, and delivery confidence.

### Infosys

Specialist Programmer
Jul 2018 - Sep 2021 • Bengaluru

- Developed reusable and responsive UI foundations that improved delivery speed, reduced implementation rework, and strengthened consistency across enterprise features.
- Improved application performance and cross-device behavior through frontend optimization and maintainable engineering practices.
- Strengthened code quality and long-term maintainability through peer reviews, refactoring initiatives, and improved engineering standards.
- Translated product and UI/UX requirements into production-ready implementations with clear structure, scalability, and maintainability.

## EDUCATION

**BITS Pilani**
**K K Birla Goa Campus**

B.E. (Hons.) Computer Science
2014 - 2018

## TECHNOLOGIES

**Frontend:** Angular, React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, RxJS, Tailwind CSS
**Backend:** Java, Spring Boot, Node.js, Python, .NET Core, REST APIs
**Databases:** Oracle DB, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, Firebase
**Cloud & Delivery:** Azure, AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Bamboo, Jira, Git
**AI & Engineering Workflows:** AI-Assisted Engineering, LLM-Assisted Development Workflows, AI-Accelerated Delivery Practices

## CERTIFICATIONS

- Azure Solutions Architect
- VMware Spring Professional
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect
- Google Project Management

entries.title: Years of professional experience
entries.content:
## Years of professional experience (canonical)

**8 years** of professional experience. This is the same figure shown in the **Years of Experience** highlight on the portfolio About section.

- Career start: Jul 2018 (from `experience.careerStart`, not education graduation alone).
- Calculation: months from career start to today; display uses whole years and rounds up when 6+ months remain (site component `ExperienceYears`).
- For "how many years of experience" questions, answer **8** (or "8 years"). Do not count only the current employer or a single job on the timeline.

entries.title: Hero & About
entries.content:
## Architect by choice. Builder at heart.



Focused on reusable engineering platforms, scalable delivery practices, and thoughtful design choices that keep enterprise applications maintainable as teams and scope grow.



Architecting scalable enterprise platforms, engineering systems, and AI-Assisted Workflows .



I work across application architecture, internal platform foundations, and the delivery practices that help large engineering organizations stay aligned without slowing down.

My focus is resilient enterprise systems, stronger developer productivity, and reusable solutions that scale across teams, services, and shared code.

I specialize in application architecture, system design, engineering standards, and pragmatic AI-assisted workflows in modern enterprise environments.



### Highlights

- Years of Experience: 8 (About section highlight; career start Jul 2018)

- Enterprise Platform Engineering: Building scalable solutions that drive impact

- Technical Leadership: Driving teams, mentoring talent and delivering business value

- Global Environments: Working with enterprise clients across domains and geographies

entries.title: Expertise
entries.content:
### Application Architecture
Designing scalable, resilient, and maintainable enterprise application ecosystems.

### System Design
Architecting modular and scalable systems with clean architectural principles.

### Platform Engineering
Building reusable engineering platforms and scalable development foundations.

### Scalable Development Practices
Driving consistency, maintainability, and engineering efficiency across teams and applications.

### Technical Leadership
Leading technical direction, engineering alignment, and cross-team collaboration.

### AI-Assisted Engineering
Leveraging AI-assisted workflows to accelerate delivery, improve quality, and enhance engineering productivity.
